mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courses (course_name, credit, course_code, description) VALUES (#{courseName}, #{credit}, #{courseCode}, #{description})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM courses WHERE 1=1
AND course_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseName}, '%')
AND course_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseCode}, '%')
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_schedules (course_id, teacher_id, classroom, day_of_week, start_time, end_time, semester, year) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{classroom}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{semester}, #{year})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM course_schedules WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} LIMIT 1
